changeSet.author: CI-OpenELIS

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.patient_identity_type WHERE identity_type = 'TB_PATIENT_CODE'

changeSet.author: CI-OpenELIS

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'patient.subject.tbnumber'

changeSet.comment: Add localization for TB patient number field

changeSet.author: CI-OpenELIS

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'patient.subject.tbnumber_rr'

changeSet.comment: Add localization for TB-RR patient code field
